title: Leveling Plus
description: A minecraft mod that adds a simple menu to the game that allows players to level up. Killings other creatures will grant you exp based on the health of the creature.
body:
This is a ligthweight mod created when I simply could not find an easy leveling up mod for players. This mod adds a few stats that can be leveled to make the player more powerful as the game progresses.

This rpg styled mod lets the player defeat enemies, either by themselves or with other players; to gain exp which once it fills their exp pool, they will level up. Upon leveling up the player gains points which can be put into different stats. Each level gain around 3 stat points [**which can be changed with a command (_all commands start with 'levelingplus'_)**], however there is a small chance for the points to be rerolled for a bonus amount which is random [_small roll 3-5, big roll 5-15_].

At the start of the game, each player gets random number in the stats. The stats included are;

- **Health** - [_range 10 - 45_] takes 4 points to gain 1 health
- **Damage** - [_range 1-5_] takes 2 points to gain 1 damage
- **Armour** - [_range 1-5_] takes 2 points to gain 1 armour
- **Tough** - [_range 1-10_] takes 2 points to gain 1 toughness
- **Speed** - [_no random_] takes 4 points to gain 1 speed {gives speed effect based on this number}
- **Agiliy** - [_range 3 - 5_] takes 10 points to gain 1 agility {attack speed}
- **Intellect** - [_no random_] takes 10 points to gain 1 intellect {at level 5 grants passive regen, at level 3 grants magic bonus damage, at level 10 grants life style to your attacks}

**No Range - the stat starts at 0**

**Range - the range you could start within for the stat. _THIS IS NOT THE LIMIT OF THE STAT_**

Commands:
_/levelingplusresetprogression_ - resets your character

_/levelingplussetexpprogression_ - this changes the amount of exp you need next time to level up [_default is 5 so from 5>10>15>20 etc_]

_/levelingplussetpointsperlevelup_ - this changes the amount of points you gain everytime you level up [_default is 3_]

_/levelingplussetskillpoints_ - this changes your skill points, not add but sets it
